message:
Dear Sir/Madam,

An attendance request has been submitted by {{ doc.employee }}. Please review the details below and take the necessary action.

Request Summary:

  • Employee: {{ doc.employee }}
  • Request Date: {{ frappe.utils.format_date(doc.from_date, "dd-MM-yyyy") }}
  • Workflow State: {{ doc.workflow_state }}
  • View Request: {% set att_req_link = frappe.utils.get_url() ~ '/app/attendance-request/' ~ doc.name %} Click here
name: Attendance Request Approval
subject: Attendance Request: {{doc.workflow_state}} - {{ doc.employee }}
